summary: Enabled System.Text.Json source-generated serialization mode for API public hot-path DTOs and added startup regression coverage.

expectedLoadTestImpact.aspNetAppElapsedP95: modest improvement when JSON serialization is material
expectedLoadTestImpact.clientP95P99: possible improvement if app serialization contributes to latency
expectedLoadTestImpact.throughput: possible small improvement, not a DB or CPU quota fix

validations.name: RED focused startup serialization test
validations.result: failed before implementation because serialization mode was not enabled

validations.name: focused startup and public endpoint tests
backend solution without Docker-backed Postgres contracts
validations.result: passed: Contract 1 skipped, Component 126, Unit 59, Architecture 39, Integration 215

validations.name: backend solution full local attempt
validations.result: failed only because local Docker/Testcontainers is unavailable for PostgresPersistenceContractTests

validations.name: frontend lint
validations.result: passed with 0 errors and 7 existing warnings

risks: Actual Real Backend Test improvement must be measured on the 2 CPU / total 8 GiB production-like runtime.
If DB pool pressure, CPU quota, or content size dominates, visible p95 improvement may be small.
Docker-backed PostgreSQL contracts require CI because Docker is unavailable locally.
recommendation: Ship through dev CI, promote to main if green, confirm GHCR publish, then rerun the same Real Backend Test baseline and compare app elapsed and GC metrics.
